channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Bitcoin left behind in the geopolitical melee
item.description: Your day-ahead look for May 22, 2026

item.title: NEAR Protocol Jumps 28% on Privacy, AI, and Scaling Upgrades
item.description: NEAR rallied by 45% this week on a series of upgrades positioning it as a potential settlement layer for AI agents and confidential finance.

item.title: Polymarket seeks Japan entry despite gambling law hurdles: Report
item.description: Polymarket is reportedly seeking entry into Japan amid falling trading volumes and rising regulatory scrutiny, targeting approval by 2030.

item.title: Ark Invest buys $12.5 million of Bullish stock in four days
item.description: Ark frequently uses broader digital asset downturns, which tend to pull crypto equities lower, as an entry point into cryptocurrency companies.

item.title: Polymarket Taps Jupiter Exec to Lead Japan Push: Report
item.description: The prediction market has reportedly appointed a representative in Japan as it aims to secure authorization to operate there by 2030.

item.title: Crypto majors stuck in tight range as altcoin rotation picks up steam
item.description: Bitcoin holds between $76,000 and $78,000 while AI tokens and HYPE surge; derivatives signal calm conditions with volatility selling dominating options markets.

item.title: Polymarket team says user funds safe as exploit losses climb above $600K
item.description: Polymarket said user funds and market resolution were safe after a suspected private key compromise tied to top-up operations.

item.title: ZachXBT flags $520K Polymarket exploit on Polygon, team says funds are safe
item.description: Blockchain investigator ZachXBT has highlighted a suspected security breach involving Polymarket, the world’s largest decentralized prediction market platform.

item.title: Verus bridge exploiter returns $8.5M after bounty offer
item.description: The hacker behind the Verus bridge exploit returned 75% of the stolen funds as part of a recovery deal negotiated with the protocol days after the incident.

item.title: Near Protocol to automate its own growth and its token is skyrocketing
item.description: Near Protocol will introduce dynamic resharding in June, allowing the blockchain to automatically add shards as demand grows without human intervention.

item.title: Polymarket aims for prediction market approval in Japan by 2030
item.description: Mike Eidlin, head of Japan at cryptocurrency exchange Jupiter, is leading Polymarket's efforts, according to reports.

item.title: Bitcoin implied volatility drops to 7 month low despite macro risks
item.description: BTC's implied volatility is a picture of calm even as financial headlines warn of macro risks.

item.title: Bitcoin price record 90-day uptrend 'resembles bull market rally:' New analysis
item.description: Bitcoin rallied for 90 days after its dip below $60,000, breaking the record for the longest uptrend within a bear market in BTC price history.

item.title: WILL HYPE HIT $100? Crypto traders predict that HYPE has a 30% chance of hitting $100 before the end of this year - odds doubled since only last week. They also predict HYPE has a 67% chance of hitting new highs at $66, and 59% chance of hitting $70. W - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTE9ONjgwbEVhMmxLT1MtbVVlNTlnc2x5MjhkeExLNGppVFZPT2NpdnhRSHc0Mm9jczZvbE01MkoyTktxV0ZwNG43VzlScEtrQUpxQzU3YW9MVE1aM1U?oc=5" target="_blank">WILL HYPE HIT $100? Crypto traders predict …

item.title: Tokenized stocks risk liquidity and revenue fragmentation: Research
item.description: TradFi views the breakup of its previously consolidated, centralized liquidity as a “serious structural threat,” said Tiger Research director Ryan Yoon.

item.title: Galaxy’s Novogratz speaks in court over failed $1.2B BitGo deal: Report
item.description: Galaxy Digital’s Mike Novogratz reportedly told a court the SEC made it “very difficult” to complete a planned 2021 merger with BitGo.

item.title: XRP ETFs attract inflows amid wallet surge. bitcoin, ether funds struggle.
item.description: Fresh inflows into XRP-linked funds and a spike in newly created wallets suggest some traders may be rotating into the token while trimming exposure to crypto’s largest assets.

item.title: SEC's Peirce tempers expectations over tokenized stocks exemption
item.description: An executive at tokenization platforms Superstate said the stricter approach suggested by Hester Peirce would enable DeFi to expand without compromising rules in traditional capital markets.

item.title: Coinbase premium hits monthly low as institutional selling pressure mounts
item.description: Uncertainty surrounding the current macro environment “appears to be pushing institutions toward hedging strategies while waiting for greater clarity,” said analyst Darkfost.

item.title: Bitcoin trades near $77,700 as analysts eye $75,000 support after liquidation wave
item.description: Open interest held steady and funding stayed subdued during the recent liquidation wave, suggesting traders were de-risking rather than capitulating, according to HashKey Research's Tim Sun.

item.title: India cracks down on prediction markets: Polymarket goes dark, Kalshi could be next
item.description: Polymarket has gone dark in India and as per local media reports, Kalshi could be next.

item.title: Accused attackers of Sandbox exec’s wife tried to flee via Uber
item.description: CertiK reported earlier this month that criminal wrench attack teams usually consist of three to five people and are often made up of amateurs, while the masterminds are outside the country.

item.title: US lawmakers renew strategic Bitcoin reserve push with ARMA bill
item.description: Under the American Reserve Modernization Act of 2026, Bitcoin must be held for a minimum of 20 years unless used to slash national debt.

item.title: 5 crypto firms wind down this week amid ongoing market slump
item.description: Fantasy.top, Everclear and ZERO Network announced they were winding down on Thursday, adding to a growing list of crypto companies that have closed this year.

item.title: Bitcoin liquidity balance hints at developing rally toward $80K
item.description: Data show Bitcoin futures traders are pursuing overhead short positions, raising the chance of a rally to $80,000.

item.title: Bitcoin longs soar despite weak US macroeconomic data: Is $82K BTC next?
item.description: Data shows Bitcoin traders cutting short positions and going long despite concerning US macroeconomic data emerging. Is a rally toward $82,000 next?

item.title: Nearly $500B in Bitcoin Is Exposed to Future Quantum Computing Attacks: Glassnode
item.description: Blockchain data firm Glassnode mapped the vulnerabilities embedded in Bitcoin’s existing supply, pointing to exchanges as a weak point.

item.title: 🚨 UPDATE: Bitcoin has more than doubled over the past 5 years, while Ethereum has remained largely flat over the same period. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE5mUnk3NXZjdWEtVG5tNmNYVHY4UUpXTHdmZkptcmk4d2k5UmZrMnJwanItWWEyeklSZ1JlZ21PcDAwWVhvLVJqYXlhaUxmUzdzZjNYdEthVU81SXA1SzJ3T2p4Qms?oc=5" target="_blank">🚨 UPDATE: Bitcoin has more tha…

item.title: Prominent Ethereum Dev Proposes $1 Billion ETH Organization With Leader Who 'Wants to Fight'
item.description: Former Ethereum Foundation researcher Dankrad Feist appeared to take pointed shots Thursday at ETH co-founder Vitalik Buterin.

item.title: Harvard dumps entire ETH position after just one quarter
item.description: Harvard's endowment fund has become one of the latest high-profile holders to liquidate its ETH as investor sentiment sours during the ongoing bear market.

item.title: Spotify and Universal Launch AI Remix Tool for Fan-Made Covers
item.description: Spotify and Universal Music Group say their new licensed AI remix platform will let fans create song covers and remixes while compensating participating artists and songwriters.

item.title: 🚨NEW: SEC Commissioner and Crypto Task Force chief @HesterPeirce is tempering expectations around the agency’s contemplated innovation exemption for tokenized stocks, saying she expects it to apply narrowly to onchain equity products, not synthetic t - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTFA5eWRRVDVzQ3dQaTFlNjRjXy1TZF9nMmtjUXlRLXZTSWtka1puZ3NuanpvS2dQZ01wbzk4RHU2S2t1bTZXV2pjSW42NVRHb3hvc3JfMng0Rjd5eEN4T1M0clcwUFFXZw?oc=5" target="_blank">🚨NEW: SEC Commissioner and …

item.title: DeepSeek Is Building Its Own Claude Code. Beijing Wants the Whole Stack
item.description: The Chinese AI lab already powers coding agents worldwide. Now it wants to own the tool developers use to run them.

item.title: Young Adults Involved in AI Romance Hide Full Use From Partners 69% of the Time
item.description: Researchers found regular AI companion use among partnered young adults was linked to lower relationship stability and communication quality.

item.title: Crypto PAC backed by Anchorage and Chainlink announces endorsements for 2026 midterms
item.description: Federal Election Commission filings showed only $175,000 in contributions to the hybrid PAC, which could influence US voters through media buys before key elections in several states.

item.title: Chance of new Bitcoin lows ‘extremely slim’ as long-term holders’ supply tops 15M BTC
item.description: Data suggest Bitcoin’s chance of dropping below $60,000 again is slim to none, thanks to longer-term investors holding more than 71% of the asset’s total supply.

item.title: Binance launches SpaceX-linked perpetual futures ahead of IPO
item.description: The crypto exchange's new pre-IPO futures product lets traders speculate on SpaceX’s expected public market valuation before the company begins trading on public exchanges.

item.title: NHL Agrees to Share Data With the CFTC for Prediction Market Integrity
item.description: The agreement ensures the regulator and the NHL communicate and share data to protect the integrity of hockey-related prediction markets.

item.title: ⚡️ LATEST: Dankrad Feist of Tempo Labs and the Ethereum Foundation said Ethereum needs a new $1B+ organization funded by staking revenue and aligned with ETH growth to “get Ethereum back to winning.” - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTFBZWGlfOUtyOGNva1daa0dOOWtjZTZzS1ZMajYtR1EweUl3TldFaUZ3UjUyWjlENDA5RkRHZXJ5WlRoazNrU1VvUmFLRUxPM091WXV3d1VvUkl5MzNtbGdwMnJzWms?oc=5" target="_blank">⚡️ LATEST: Dankrad Feist of Tem…

item.title: Agree with @RyanSAdams that a deep bench of leaders and developers are ready to ensure $ETH remains the future settlement layer of finance and AI - to me, much of bearish sentiment reflects the disdain and despair seen at the nadir of crypto winter (finger - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiX0FVX3lxTE02TmJkYW1vS3g3Y2daZzZkcUxzMnZFVDgxVmVoNHB3QzRJMWszblVuSUx0YlNqc0VQalZ2ZDVhS0pIWXBMWV90WEFheENLY1AwTVBiUEZvT0NDUllmSkhv?oc=5" target="_blank">Agree with @RyanSAdams that a deep ben…

item.title: Mark Cuban Says He Sold Most of His Bitcoin
item.description: Outspoken billionaire Mark Cuban is disappointed with Bitcoin's performance, and said he's parted ways with most of the BTC in his portfolio.

item.title: Satoshi’s 1.1 million bitcoin and millions more can be saved from quantum attack, says expert
item.description: Researchers at the privacy-centric blockchain startup say their multi-layer quantum defense will feature a soft fork to freeze and protect dormant BTC.

item.title: Petition to scrap South Korea's crypto tax reaches 50K threshold
item.description: Critics say the new 22% crypto tax, set to take effect in 2027, unfairly favors other asset classes with a much lower tax burden.

item.title: JUST IN: Billionaire Mark Cuban says he sold "most" of his Bitcoin. "Bitcoin has lost the plot." - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE1iUlAwd2hoZDk1MzJucTRBT2p0VVRDVktMZTlhc0h0RnNNd1hKcVNfOV9BYlh6aGFYaG9XSVlpRG5pUm1lT2Vfdy1iSmdHcGl6WDdkY1ZxTC1LLTRTMC1RZ2pR?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Billionaire Mark Cuban sa…

item.title: CFTC signs MOU with National Hockey League over prediction markets
item.description: The financial regulator signed a similar agreement with Major League Baseball in March and continues to file lawsuits against state-level authorities going after prediction market platforms over sports betting.

item.title: Proposed ARMA Bill Aims to Enshrine Strategic Bitcoin Reserve Into Law
item.description: The American Reserve Modernization Act would direct the Treasury to create and maintain a Bitcoin reserve for a minimum of 20 years.

item.title: Trump Halts AI Order Over Fears It Could Hurt US Edge Over China
item.description: Trump said he delayed the order because parts of the proposal risked slowing the U.S. AI industry as competition with China intensifies.

item.title: BREAKING 🚨: Ethereum Harvard dumps entire $ETH position worth $87 Million 🤯👀 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXkFVX3lxTE1WcEx2Yk5FZm9DNWpvRi11Mm42ZDNIYU9GLWRQb1dKSVJ3U2pob3RCN0JVeHdxYTM3UnkzTGJlY0lXc1g5c1Y5dXBWNjF0MlNHa2hoTVdPRDFBRld6OXc?oc=5" target="_blank">BREAKING 🚨: Ethereum Harvard dumps ent…

item.title: Ethereum Crypto Influencer Game 'Fantasy Top' Shutting Down
item.description: Fantasy Top, a game that reimagines fantasy sports through the lens of Crypto Twitter, will close down two years after its hot launch.

item.title: Nvidia Beats, Stock Dumps—BofA Says Buy the Dip
item.description: Record $81.6 billion in revenue for Nvidia—and yet the stock fell. Bank of America called the dip noise and raised its price target.

item.title: Blockchain.com confidentially submits IPO filing with SEC
item.description: The crypto services company began the US IPO process as companies across the digital asset sector weigh public market debuts.

item.title: Mark Cuban says he sold most of his Bitcoin after failed hedge narrative 'disappointed' the billionaire
item.description: The billionaire investor said he sold most of his bitcoin after concluding the cryptocurrency failed to act as a hedge during recent geopolitical turmoil and dollar weakness.

item.title: US Government Makes $2 Billion Bet on Quantum Computing as Threat to Bitcoin Grows
item.description: The U.S. Department of Commerce will invest $2 billion into quantum chip foundries and startups as the "Q-Day" Bitcoin threat nears.

item.title: LATEST: Mark Cuban reveals he sold "most" of his $BTC "Bitcoin has lost the plot" h/t Portfolio Players - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXkFVX3lxTE5hTks3SDhJdk9TY0R3MGRkbW56RHZxMXkxeEk1RVNiNDh1REF6eHpaU1hXMEpKVUR0enFCM3h3eW9tUTFrbXJfbk1McE9zaGEyejdrLUlWWW1oX1hBa1E?oc=5" target="_blank">LATEST: Mark Cuban reveals he sold "mos…

item.title: Ethereum’s identity crisis is deepening after high-profile 'brain drain' frustrates the community
item.description: What began earlier this week as shock over more exits of core figures has now evolved into something more existential, according to some community members.

item.title: Crypto Exchange Kraken Secures VARA License to Launch in Dubai
item.description: Dubai's Virtual Asset Regulatory Authority granted Kraken’s parent company preliminary broker-dealer and investment management authorization.

item.title: 'The Sandbox' Co-Founder's Wife Targeted in Crypto Kidnapping Attempt: Report
item.description: France has become an epicenter of so-called “wrench attacks” targeting crypto executives and their families.

item.title: Crypto prediction markets are turning into dangerous national security risks, and Congress wants to ban them
item.description: Bubblemaps investigators led by Nicolas Vaiman, discovered 80 bets on Polymarket with a 98% win rate that he said is statistically impossible to achieve.

item.title: U.S. CFTC secures deal with National Hockey League on prediction market safeguards
item.description: A new arrangement has been set between the derivatives regulator and professional hockey, following on the heels of a similar baseball agreement.

item.title: Crypto for Advisors: Crypto Products
item.description: Advisors need to assess ETP custody, sponsor profiles, and fees. Read expert advice on bitcoin-backed loans, including margin call risks and when to sell vs. borrow.
